title: Task outcome: Read-only audit focused on behavior evaluation, feedback writeback, corrections, memory-on/off p
summary: Completed read-only audit of behavior evaluation, feedback writeback, memory audit, memory-on/off proof, and verify-v2 behavior proof surfaces. Found that current behavior evaluation is retrieval/term scoring rather than answer-quality or correction-behavior proof, verify-v2 uses only a temporary self-referential golden case, and memory-use audit returns ok even when trust evidence is degraded.
claim: Task outcome for dinobrain: Completed read-only audit of behavior evaluation, feedback writeback, memory audit, memory-on/off proof, and verify-v2 behavior proof surfaces. Found that current behavior evaluation is retrieval/term scoring rather than answer-quality or correction-behavior proof, verify-v2 uses only a temporary self-referential golden case, and memory-use audit returns ok even when trust evidence is degraded.
request: Read-only audit focused on behavior evaluation, feedback writeback, corrections, memory-on/off proof, Ragas/LangSmith-style evaluation. Inspect src/behavior-eval.ts, src/evaluate-behavior.ts, src/memory-audit.ts, record_feedback_correction wiring if present, scripts/verify-v2-os.mjs. Return P0/P1 findings with file/line evidence, fixes, and consensus candidate statements. Do not edit files.
decisions: Treat the current behavior-eval implementation as retrieval-path proof, not Ragas/LangSmith-style behavior proof.
Do not claim real-vault memory-on behavior improvement until representative behavior-golden cases and answer-quality scoring exist.
Memory-use audit needs hard pass/fail semantics for expected memory and observed evidence before it can serve as proof.
next_steps: Replace request-term scoring with answer-quality scoring for memory-on versus memory-off runs.
Add real-vault behavior-golden cases and require them in verification.
Tighten audit_memory_use so missing expected memory, hallucinated references, and unverified artifacts can fail proof checks.

evidence.snippet: Completed read-only audit of behavior evaluation, feedback writeback, memory audit, memory-on/off proof, and verify-v2 behavior proof surfaces. Found that current behavior evaluation is retrieval/term scoring rather than answer-quality or correction-behavior proof, verify-v2 uses only a temporary self-referential golden case, and memory-use audit returns ok even when trust evidence is degraded.
